subcodes.first_line: O daughter of the Kingdom! The letter containing the events of the past year was indeed perused [3.5s]... ...Soon will the Western regions become as radiant as the horizons of the East, and the Sun of Truth shine forth with a refulgence that will cause the darkness of error to fade away and vanish
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنت ملکوت نامه ای که شامل وقایع سنه ماضیه بود ملاحظه گردید فی الحقیقه
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @rendering assistance to God; victory [nusrat], @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual transformation, @growth of the Cause, @rejection, opposition and persecution
